official_pick_rules.note: Lab Rating is setup quality. It is not win probability. Official picks require both strong win probability and strong setup quality.

summary: No official picks cleared the stricter rules. 4 value-watch setups and 5 watchlist games remain research-only. 4 games reached a Lab Rating of 7.5+/10 but did not clear every official gate.

lab_score_breakdown.note: Lab Rating grades setup quality. It is not win probability.

games.read: Cleveland Guardians is a value watch, not an official pick. LyDia projects 65.8% against a 53.5% no-vig market number, a 12.3% model edge at -118. Lab Rating 8.9/10: model edge 35, pitcher 25, bullpen 9.24, market 15, base 5. Cleveland Guardians's pen efficiency: Average (5.3/10). It stayed a value watch because model win probability is 65.8%, below the 72.0% official-pick gate. Lineup check: Cleveland Guardians is swinging a hot bat (+0.079 OPS); Minnesota Twins is a touch below its season form (-0.038 OPS). Recent form supports this side as well.

pick_team.label: Tired
pick_team.workload_read: Elevated recent workload. Full-game angles deserve extra late-inning caution.
pick_team.score_reason: Tired (7.0/10): 15.7 relief innings over the last three days, 2 arms pitched back-to-back days. 14 reliever appearances in the window. Workload only — see efficiency for how well the pen has actually pitched.
pick_team.formula: 45 + ((Last 3 BP IP - 9) x 3.5) + ((Last game BP IP - 3) x 4) + (Back-to-back arms x 6)

context_only.note: Reliever counts are displayed for context only and do not add score points.

pick_team.efficiency_reason: Average (5.3/10): 4.02 ERA and 1.15 WHIP over 15.7 relief innings (7 ER, 12 H, 6 BB) in the last three days.
pick_team.efficiency_formula: 50 - clamp((ERA - 4.20) x 6, -25, 25) x confidence - clamp((WHIP - 1.30) x 15, -20, 20) x confidence, confidence = clamp(BP IP / 6, 0.35, 1)
